raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo kas warretu tewi fau-
dseht/ ak Jerufaleme! Jeb kas
warretu tewi noschehloht? Jeb
kas no-ees un watnahs pehz ta-
was Labklahfchanas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu efi manni afstahjuft/
fakka tas KUNGS: Tu efi
atpakkat gahjuft/ tapehz gribbu
es tawu Rohku prett tewi is-
steevt/ un tewi nomaitaht/ es
efmu peekuffs apschehlotees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es wehtifchu tohs ar
Wehtikli zaur tahs Semmes
Wahrtin/ un es nolaupifchu
manneem Laudim tohs Behr-
nus/ un nomaitafchu tohs/ ta-
pehz ka tee no Jaweem Zelfeem
ne atgreeschahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Man taps wairak Atraik-
u winnu Starpâ/ neka Ju-
ras Similtis. Es weddifchu
pahr to Jannekfu Mahti weenu
Bobstitaju Deenas-Widdû/ es
likchu winnu peepefchi usbrukt
tam Ptissahfam ar Jstruhzina-
tchanahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta/ kas feptius Behr-
nus Dsemde/ buhs wahja/ un
islafdihf fawn Dwehfseli. Win
nas Saule no-ees/ kad wehl fee-
la Gaifina irraid/ winna taps
Kaunâ/ un par Apfineekti/ un
winzu Atliffufschaß nodohfchn es
jam Sohbizam winzo Eenaid-
neeku Preekfcha/ fakka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Waj man! manna Mah-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS fazzija:
Tew pehz fchim labbi klahteês/
un es afstahweefhu tewi pee ta Je-
Eenaidneeka/ Nelaimibas Laika/
un Behdu Laika.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Arrig fahda Dfelfe irr/
kas to Dfelfi/ un to Warru no
Seenteka-Puffes warretu fa-
daufcht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bek juhsfu Padohmu/un
juhsas Mantas nedohfchu es
var Laupijuunu bes Maffas/ un
to wiﬀu juhsfu Grehku deht/eekfch
wiﬁahm juhsfu Rohbeschahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es likfchu juhs aifseet
ar juhsfu Eenaidneefeem fahdâ
Semmê/ ko juhs ne pasifstat:
Jo weens ugguns irr eededsi-
nahts manna Bahrsiba/ tas
pahr juhs dehgs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak KUNGS! tn finni
te/ veeminnt mannis/ un pee-
kle manni/ un atreeb mannt
no manneem Bakkat-Dfinne-
kad tu tawu Dufnibu (pahe
teem) pagarrina/ tn finni/ ka
es tevis labbad toypu nee-
wahts.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
